response.name: The Fountain of Becoming (Unnamed Settlement instance)
response.ambient: A stone fountain — weathered, plain, the kind one might find at the centre of any small town's square. The basin is circular, roughly chest-high to a standing adult. Water moves in the basin: silver,

visible_renders.name: Fountain Inscription (IAM NOTUM SUM)
visible_renders.one_line: Three Latin words carved deep into the stone of the fountain basin, on the side

visible_renders.name: The Sitter's Presence at the Fountain (render-only — atmospheric)
visible_renders.one_line: Not a portable object. The render of the figure on the rim. The seed roller reso

obvious_edges.name: out
obvious_edges.description: Back into the square proper — the crossroads, the four landmarks, the cobbleston

obvious_edges.name: from_desert_inbound_only
obvious_edges.description: New arrivals enter the fountain clearing from the desert. The boundary cobblesto

response.active_state_text: The water rises in silence. The sitter is on the rim, looking at nothing in particular. They are not waiting for anything visible; the fountain has called them here for whoever arrives next. The inscription is plainly visible.
